testpoints.name: csrrw_read_mstatus
testpoints.description: CSRRW x1, mstatus: read mstatus value via CSR read, csr_result_e1_write_o asserted

testpoints.name: csrrs_read_mstatus
testpoints.description: CSRRS x1, mstatus: atomic read-and-set of mstatus via CSRRS instruction

testpoints.name: csrrc_read_clear_mstatus
testpoints.description: CSRRC x1, mstatus: atomic read-and-clear of mstatus via CSRRC instruction

testpoints.name: csrrwi_immediate_read
testpoints.description: CSRRWI x1, mstatus: immediate-form CSR read with uimm=0 (no register write)

testpoints.name: ecall_machine_mode
testpoints.description: ECALL from M-mode: generates synchronous exception with cause code 11

testpoints.name: ebreak
testpoints.description: EBREAK: generates breakpoint exception with cause code 3

testpoints.name: mret_return
testpoints.description: MRET: reads MEPC, restores MIE from MPIE, sets MPP=0, generates branch to return address

testpoints.name: sret_return
testpoints.description: SRET: reads SEPC, restores SIE from SPIE, sets SPP=0, generates branch to return address

testpoints.name: wfi_no_action
testpoints.description: WFI: wait for interrupt, no special action in simplified implementation, no exception generated

testpoints.name: fence_instruction
testpoints.description: FENCE instruction: sets ifence_o flag to 1

testpoints.name: external_interrupt_taken
testpoints.description: External interrupt signal asserted: take_interrupt_o asserted when interrupts enabled

testpoints.name: external_interrupt_inhibited
testpoints.description: External interrupt with interrupt_inhibit active: take_interrupt_o remains deasserted

testpoints.name: writeback_exception_priority
testpoints.description: Writeback stage exception (bit 5 set) takes priority over decode stage exceptions

testpoints.name: opcode_invalid
testpoints.description: Invalid opcode signal prevents CSR instruction decode, no outputs asserted

testpoints.name: satp_change_triggers_flush
testpoints.description: SATP value change detected: mmu_flush_o asserted for one cycle

testpoints.name: mmu_control_from_mstatus
testpoints.description: MXR, SUM, MPRV bits in mstatus affect mmu_mxr_o, mmu_sum_o, mmu_priv_d_o

testpoints.name: no_valid_opcode
testpoints.description: No valid opcode: no CSR read, no branch, all outputs remain at default

testpoints.name: csr_result_e1_value_output
testpoints.description: CSR instruction read data appears on csr_result_e1_value_o and csr_result_e1_wdata_o
